name: mediajira_miro_snapshot_rules
description: Rules and output contract for generating a MediaJira Miro board snapshot. This is not a Dify app DSL export.

frame.purpose: Container for a section of related items
notes: Use content or style.label as the visible frame title
Frames should usually be larger than their child items

sticky_note.purpose: Short insight, anomaly, task or recommendation
notes: Keep content concise, usually under 140 characters
Use warm colors for anomalies and action items
Use for titles, subtitles, summaries and legends

shape.purpose: Structured node such as a decision block or summary block

connector.purpose: Directional relationship between two items or sections
notes: Render connectors horizontally using the item's width and height
Optional content can label the relationship

layout_notes: Infer the number of frames from the available structured content rather than forcing exactly three sections.
When there are 1-3 sections, use a single row.
When there are 4-6 sections, use a two-row grid with left-to-right reading order.
All child items must remain fully inside their parent frame bounds.
Prefer readable summaries as primary labels and move raw internal names to secondary text when needed.
